seoTitle: How to Get the Freshdesk Widget
metaDescription: Learn how to find and set up the Freshdesk support widget so customers can reach out or search help articles right from your site.
intro: The Freshdesk widget lets customers submit tickets or browse your knowledge base without leaving your website. This guide covers where to locate the widget code and how to get it ready to add to your site.

steps.heading: Open the widget settings
steps.body: In your Freshdesk admin panel, navigate to the section for support widgets or feedback widgets.

steps.heading: Create or select a widget
steps.body: Create a new widget or select an existing one, then configure what it displays, such as a contact form or help articles.

steps.heading: Customize the widget appearance
steps.body: Adjust colors, text, and placement options so the widget matches your website's design.

steps.heading: Copy the widget embed code
steps.body: Copy the generated embed code, which you'll need to add to your website to display the widget.

faq.question: What does the Freshdesk widget do?
faq.answer: It's an embeddable panel that lets website visitors submit support tickets or search your knowledge base without leaving the page.

faq.question: Do I need to code to get the widget?
faq.answer: You don't need to build the widget from scratch, but you will need to paste the provided embed code into your website.

faq.question: Can I customize how the widget looks?
faq.answer: Yes, Freshdesk provides options to adjust the widget's colors, text, and behavior before you embed it.

faq.question: Is the widget free to use?
faq.answer: Widget availability depends on your Freshdesk plan, so check your plan's feature list to confirm access.
